lore.english:
Demon. Half-human, half-tiger. An executive of Yomihara's "Beast Kingdom" gang. She's like a younger sister to the Beast Kingdom's leader, Hairo Ichirota. Her looks and behavior seem young, but she has a strong sense of loyalty and justice. She helps discriminated beastmen in many ways.

Normally, she takes the form of a human, but can transform herself into a "Weretiger" form. She gains superhuman strength, regenerative ability, and agility in this form, growing sharp teeth and claws that can tear through steel. Her war cry can terrorize the mind and body.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Tiger Claw Fist[-]
skills.description:
Attacks the enemy 2 times by slashing them with powerful claws.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:870102]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:870102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:870102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Beast Roar[-]
skills.description:
Roars out loud and grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:870201]%)[-] [&AtkUp] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:870201] turn(s)
Reduces [&DeBuff] turn(s) on [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by [V2:870202] turn(s).

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Rip and Tear[-]
skills.description:
Randomly slashes the enemy 6 times.
If the character has 1 [&Buff] or more, performs an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack] 1 time. 
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]20%[-] when the character performs an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack], deals [&Common_Word_Skill_DeathDmg] at a fixed chance of [&Color_Cyan][R:870303]%[-].

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_8701]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_8703]
skill_data.description:
Randomly slashes the enemy 6 times.
Performs an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack] without any conditions. 
When the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]20%[-] on every [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack], deals [&Common_Word_Skill_DeathDmg] at a fixed chance of [&Color_Cyan][R:871303]%[-].
